tasks.title: Remove Comm Dish rock resource highlighting
tasks.description: Delete the getCommDishRevealedTiles() and drawCommDishOverlay() functions from game.js, and remove the call site in the render() function that invokes them. This removes the purposeless cyan overlay that highlights rock resources near Comm Dishes.
tasks.acceptance_criteria:
1. The getCommDishRevealedTiles function no longer exists in game.js.
2. The drawCommDishOverlay function no longer exists in game.js.
3. The render() function no longer calls either of these functions.
4. All other Comm Dish functionality (building, calling Earth, drawing the structure) remains intact.
5. The game renders without errors.
tasks.claudeMd:
# Project Context

You are working on a single-file browser game (`game.js`, vanilla JS, no build system, no framework).

## Task

Remove the rock resource highlighting overlay from Comm Dishes. Three deletions needed:

1. **Delete `getCommDishRevealedTiles()` function** (~lines 737–771) — BFS that finds rock tiles near comm dishes.
2. **Delete `drawCommDishOverlay(revealedTiles)` function** (~lines 773–788) — Draws cyan overlay on revealed tiles.
3. **Delete the call site in `render()`** (~lines 800–802):
   ```js
   // Draw Comm Dish rock reveal overlay
   var revealedTiles = getCommDishRevealedTiles();
   drawCommDishOverlay(revealedTiles);
   ```

Do NOT touch any other Comm Dish code (building, calling Earth, drawing the structure sprite).

## Conventions
- Vanilla JS, no modules, no build step
- Match existing code style (var declarations, for loops, etc.)
- No comments needed for deletions

steps: Find the getCommDishRevealedTiles function in game.js (starts around line 737)
Delete the entire function including the blank line after it
Verify with grep that getCommDishRevealedTiles no longer appears in game.js
Find the drawCommDishOverlay function in game.js (starts around line 773)
Delete the entire function including the blank line after it
Verify with grep that drawCommDishOverlay no longer appears in game.js

checklist.description: Delete the call site in render()
steps: Find the 3 lines in the render() function that call getCommDishRevealedTiles and drawCommDishOverlay (around lines 800-802)
Delete those 3 lines (comment + two function calls)
Verify render() still has its other drawing code intact

checklist.description: Verify other Comm Dish functionality is untouched
steps: Confirm buildCommDish, canBuildCommDish, drawCommDish, getAdjacentCommDish, and callEarth functions still exist
Confirm no syntax errors by checking the file can be parsed

quality_checklist.description: No dangling references to removed functions
steps: Grep game.js for getCommDishRevealedTiles — should have zero matches
Grep game.js for drawCommDishOverlay — should have zero matches

checks.description: Game loads without JS errors and Comm Dish area has no cyan overlay on rock tiles
steps: Build a Comm Dish near rock tiles
Verify no cyan highlight overlay appears around the dish
Verify other Comm Dish features (build, call Earth) still work
